chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No.D-1864 of 2016 ______________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge Present Mr. Justice Muhammad Ali Mazhar Mr. Justice Arshad Hussain Khan Abdul Hai Khan............... Petitioner V E R S U S National Industrial Relations Commission, & others................. Respondents Date of hearing 03.10.2016 Ch. Mohammad Latif Sagar advocate for petitioner Shaikh Liaqat Hussain Standing Counsel. ------------------------- Muhammad Ali Mazhar, J: Mr. Javed Asghar Awan advocate has filed Vakalatnama for Respondent Nos. 3 & 4. Learned counsel for the petitioner argued that Chairman, N.I.R.C. has been appointed and there is a possibility that immediately after Moharram holidays, the Full Bench will hear the cases at Karachi. He requests that some reasonable time may be given so that appeal may be heard by Full Bench and some orders may be passed in the appeal. 2. Learned counsel for the Respondent Nos. 3 & 4 argued that Full Bench is available at Islamabad and petitioner may approach and proceed his appeal. It is not necessary that each and every appeal should be heard at Karachi. The learned counsel for the petitioner requests for some time for pursuing the appeal before the Full Bench of N.I.R.C. Consequently, this petition is disposed of with the directions that the petitioner may approach the learned Full Bench of N.I.R.C. for deciding appeal within twenty five days. In the meanwhile no adverse action shall be taken against the petitioner. JUDGE JUDGE Aadil Arab
